---
title: "Notes"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

<div class="landing-stack">

::: {.landing-hero}
<span class="hero-eyebrow">Evaluation notes</span>

# Notes overview

This section collects source-grounded study notes from the MCP research library's `evaluation-texts` collection. The notes combine the existing hand-authored Purposeful Program Theory section, chapter-level Rossi/Lipsey, Chen, Impact Evaluation in Practice, and Realistic Evaluation notes, step-level Patton/U-FE notes, and generated notes for the other ready evaluation texts.

<div class="page-metadata">
  <span>10 books</span>
  <span>Evaluation texts</span>
  <span>MCP sourced</span>
  <span><a href="../references.bib" download>Export BibTeX</a></span>
</div>
:::

```{=html}
<div class="notes-filter" role="search" aria-label="Filter note tiles">
  <label for="notes-search">Find
    <input id="notes-search" type="search" placeholder="Search notes" autocomplete="off" />
  </label>
  <label for="notes-book-filter">Book
    <select id="notes-book-filter">
      <option value="all">All books</option>
              <option value="purposeful-programme-theory">Purposeful Program Theory</option>
              <option value="practical-program-evaluation">Practical Program Evaluation</option>
              <option value="qualitative-research-evaluation-methods">Qualitative Research & Evaluation Methods</option>
              <option value="realistic-evaluation">Realistic Evaluation</option>
              <option value="impact-evaluation-in-practice">Impact Evaluation in Practice</option>
              <option value="handbook-practical-program-evaluation">Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation</option>
              <option value="evaluation-systematic-approach">Evaluation: A Systematic Approach</option>
              <option value="essentials-utilization-focused-evaluation">Essentials of Utilization-Focused Evaluation</option>
              <option value="magenta-book">Magenta Book</option>
              <option value="evaluation-theory-models-applications">Evaluation Theory, Models, and Applications</option>
</select>
  </label>
  <label for="notes-type-filter">Type
    <select id="notes-type-filter">
      <option value="all">All types</option>
      <option value="Book">Book</option>
      <option value="Synthesis">Synthesis</option>
      <option value="Map">Map</option>
      <option value="Practice">Practice</option>
    </select>
  </label>
</div>
<p class="notes-filter-count" id="notes-filter-count" aria-live="polite"></p>
```

::: {.section-grid}
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="purposeful-programme-theory" data-type="Book"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2011</span></div>

### [Purposeful Program Theory](purposeful-programme-theory/index.qmd)

Theories of change, theories of action, logic models, assumptions, and causal inference for program theory use.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="purposeful-programme-theory" data-type="Synthesis"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-synthesis">Synthesis</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2011</span></div>

### [Core Concepts: Purposeful Program Theory](purposeful-programme-theory/concepts.qmd)

Recurring concepts and distinctions for this source.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="purposeful-programme-theory" data-type="Map"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-map">Map</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2011</span></div>

### [Chapter Map: Purposeful Program Theory](purposeful-programme-theory/chapter-map.qmd)

Selected source sections, evidence IDs, and reading route.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="purposeful-programme-theory" data-type="Practice"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-practice">Practice</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2011</span></div>

### [Practice Implications: Purposeful Program Theory](purposeful-programme-theory/evaluation-practice-implications.qmd)

Evaluation design habits and practical uses.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="practical-program-evaluation" data-type="Book"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2015</span></div>

### [Practical Program Evaluation](practical-program-evaluation/index.qmd)

A practice-oriented guide to matching evaluation types, program stages, logic models, and program theory.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="practical-program-evaluation" data-type="Synthesis"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-synthesis">Synthesis</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2015</span></div>

### [Core Concepts: Practical Program Evaluation](practical-program-evaluation/concepts.qmd)

Recurring concepts and distinctions for this source.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="practical-program-evaluation" data-type="Map"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-map">Map</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2015</span></div>

### [Chapter Map: Practical Program Evaluation](practical-program-evaluation/chapter-map.qmd)

Selected source sections, evidence IDs, and reading route.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="practical-program-evaluation" data-type="Practice"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-practice">Practice</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2015</span></div>

### [Practice Implications: Practical Program Evaluation](practical-program-evaluation/practice-implications.qmd)

Evaluation design habits and practical uses.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="qualitative-research-evaluation-methods" data-type="Book"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2015</span></div>

### [Qualitative Research & Evaluation Methods](qualitative-research-evaluation-methods/index.qmd)

Qualitative inquiry for evaluation questions where context, meaning, process, and use matter.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="qualitative-research-evaluation-methods" data-type="Synthesis"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-synthesis">Synthesis</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2015</span></div>

### [Core Concepts: Qualitative Research & Evaluation Methods](qualitative-research-evaluation-methods/concepts.qmd)

Recurring concepts and distinctions for this source.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="qualitative-research-evaluation-methods" data-type="Map"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-map">Map</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2015</span></div>

### [Chapter Map: Qualitative Research & Evaluation Methods](qualitative-research-evaluation-methods/chapter-map.qmd)

Selected source sections, evidence IDs, and reading route.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="qualitative-research-evaluation-methods" data-type="Practice"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-practice">Practice</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2015</span></div>

### [Practice Implications: Qualitative Research & Evaluation Methods](qualitative-research-evaluation-methods/practice-implications.qmd)

Evaluation design habits and practical uses.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="realistic-evaluation" data-type="Book"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">1997</span></div>

### [Realistic Evaluation](realistic-evaluation/index.qmd)

A realist approach to explaining what works, for whom, in what circumstances, and why.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="realistic-evaluation" data-type="Synthesis"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-synthesis">Synthesis</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">1997</span></div>

### [Core Concepts: Realistic Evaluation](realistic-evaluation/concepts.qmd)

Recurring concepts and distinctions for this source.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="realistic-evaluation" data-type="Map"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-map">Map</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">1997</span></div>

### [Chapter Map: Realistic Evaluation](realistic-evaluation/chapter-map.qmd)

Selected source sections, evidence IDs, and reading route.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="realistic-evaluation" data-type="Practice"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-practice">Practice</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">1997</span></div>

### [Practice Implications: Realistic Evaluation](realistic-evaluation/practice-implications.qmd)

Evaluation design habits and practical uses.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="impact-evaluation-in-practice" data-type="Book"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2016</span></div>

### [Impact Evaluation in Practice](impact-evaluation-in-practice/index.qmd)

Impact evaluation design around theory of change, counterfactuals, questions, methods, data, and implementation timing.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="impact-evaluation-in-practice" data-type="Synthesis"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-synthesis">Synthesis</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2016</span></div>

### [Core Concepts: Impact Evaluation in Practice](impact-evaluation-in-practice/concepts.qmd)

Recurring concepts and distinctions for this source.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="impact-evaluation-in-practice" data-type="Map"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-map">Map</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2016</span></div>

### [Chapter Map: Impact Evaluation in Practice](impact-evaluation-in-practice/chapter-map.qmd)

Selected source sections, evidence IDs, and reading route.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="impact-evaluation-in-practice" data-type="Practice"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-practice">Practice</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2016</span></div>

### [Practice Implications: Impact Evaluation in Practice](impact-evaluation-in-practice/practice-implications.qmd)

Evaluation design habits and practical uses.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="handbook-practical-program-evaluation" data-type="Book"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2015</span></div>

### [Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation](handbook-practical-program-evaluation/index.qmd)

A broad handbook on evaluation planning, stakeholder engagement, monitoring, study designs, and use.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="handbook-practical-program-evaluation" data-type="Synthesis"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-synthesis">Synthesis</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2015</span></div>

### [Core Concepts: Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation](handbook-practical-program-evaluation/concepts.qmd)

Recurring concepts and distinctions for this source.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="handbook-practical-program-evaluation" data-type="Map"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-map">Map</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2015</span></div>

### [Chapter Map: Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation](handbook-practical-program-evaluation/chapter-map.qmd)

Selected source sections, evidence IDs, and reading route.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="handbook-practical-program-evaluation" data-type="Practice"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-practice">Practice</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2015</span></div>

### [Practice Implications: Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation](handbook-practical-program-evaluation/practice-implications.qmd)

Evaluation design habits and practical uses.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="evaluation-systematic-approach" data-type="Book"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2004</span></div>

### [Evaluation: A Systematic Approach](evaluation-systematic-approach/index.qmd)

A systematic evaluation framework covering questions, needs, theory, process, impact, efficiency, and use.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="evaluation-systematic-approach" data-type="Synthesis"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-synthesis">Synthesis</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2004</span></div>

### [Core Concepts: Evaluation: A Systematic Approach](evaluation-systematic-approach/concepts.qmd)

Recurring concepts and distinctions for this source.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="evaluation-systematic-approach" data-type="Map"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-map">Map</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2004</span></div>

### [Chapter Map: Evaluation: A Systematic Approach](evaluation-systematic-approach/chapter-map.qmd)

Selected source sections, evidence IDs, and reading route.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="evaluation-systematic-approach" data-type="Practice"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-practice">Practice</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2004</span></div>

### [Practice Implications: Evaluation: A Systematic Approach](evaluation-systematic-approach/practice-implications.qmd)

Evaluation design habits and practical uses.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="essentials-utilization-focused-evaluation" data-type="Book"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2012</span></div>

### [Essentials of Utilization-Focused Evaluation](essentials-utilization-focused-evaluation/index.qmd)

A compact guide to designing evaluations for primary intended users and actual use.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="essentials-utilization-focused-evaluation" data-type="Synthesis"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-synthesis">Synthesis</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2012</span></div>

### [Core Concepts: Essentials of Utilization-Focused Evaluation](essentials-utilization-focused-evaluation/concepts.qmd)

Recurring concepts and distinctions for this source.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="essentials-utilization-focused-evaluation" data-type="Map"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-map">Map</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2012</span></div>

### [Chapter Map: Essentials of Utilization-Focused Evaluation](essentials-utilization-focused-evaluation/chapter-map.qmd)

Selected source sections, evidence IDs, and reading route.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="essentials-utilization-focused-evaluation" data-type="Practice"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-practice">Practice</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2012</span></div>

### [Practice Implications: Essentials of Utilization-Focused Evaluation](essentials-utilization-focused-evaluation/practice-implications.qmd)

Evaluation design habits and practical uses.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="magenta-book" data-type="Book"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2020</span></div>

### [Magenta Book](magenta-book/index.qmd)

UK central government guidance on evaluation scoping, methods, data, management, dissemination, and capability.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="magenta-book" data-type="Synthesis"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-synthesis">Synthesis</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2020</span></div>

### [Core Concepts: Magenta Book](magenta-book/concepts.qmd)

Recurring concepts and distinctions for this source.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="magenta-book" data-type="Map"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-map">Map</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2020</span></div>

### [Chapter Map: Magenta Book](magenta-book/chapter-map.qmd)

Selected source sections, evidence IDs, and reading route.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="magenta-book" data-type="Practice"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-practice">Practice</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2020</span></div>

### [Practice Implications: Magenta Book](magenta-book/practice-implications.qmd)

Evaluation design habits and practical uses.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="evaluation-theory-models-applications" data-type="Book"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2014</span></div>

### [Evaluation Theory, Models, and Applications](evaluation-theory-models-applications/index.qmd)

A survey and assessment of evaluation theory, models, standards, CIPP, metaevaluation, and applications.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="evaluation-theory-models-applications" data-type="Synthesis"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-synthesis">Synthesis</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2014</span></div>

### [Core Concepts: Evaluation Theory, Models, and Applications](evaluation-theory-models-applications/concepts.qmd)

Recurring concepts and distinctions for this source.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="evaluation-theory-models-applications" data-type="Map"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-map">Map</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2014</span></div>

### [Chapter Map: Evaluation Theory, Models, and Applications](evaluation-theory-models-applications/chapter-map.qmd)

Selected source sections, evidence IDs, and reading route.
:::
::: {.section-card data-note-card="" data-book="evaluation-theory-models-applications" data-type="Practice"}
<div class="badge-row"><span class="page-badge badge-practice">Practice</span><span class="page-badge badge-chapter">2014</span></div>

### [Practice Implications: Evaluation Theory, Models, and Applications](evaluation-theory-models-applications/practice-implications.qmd)

Evaluation design habits and practical uses.
:::
:::

```{=html}
<script src="../assets/js/notes_filter.js"></script>
```

</div>
